panels.title: ${base} mid price — all exchanges (click legend to toggle)

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "pyth_fair" FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '/USD') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "bybit" FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "bitget" FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "gate" FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "okx" FROM okx_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}-USDT-SWAP' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "kucoin" FROM kucoin_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}' = 'BTC' THEN 'XBTUSDTM' ELSE concat('${base}', 'USDTM') END AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "bingx" FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}-USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "mexc" FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "backpack" FROM backpack_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '_USDC_PERP') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "hashkey" FROM hashkey_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT-PERPETUAL') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "kraken" FROM kraken_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}' = 'BTC' THEN 'PF_XBTUSD' ELSE concat('PF_', '${base}', 'USD') END AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) "flipster" FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT.PERP') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(NULL) ORDER BY timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)), x AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)) SELECT base.t time, (x.m - base.m)/base.m * 10000 "bybit_bp" FROM base JOIN x ON base.t = x.t ORDER BY base.t

WITH base AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)), x AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)) SELECT base.t time, (x.m - base.m)/base.m * 10000 "bitget_bp" FROM base JOIN x ON base.t = x.t ORDER BY base.t

WITH base AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)), x AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)) SELECT base.t time, (x.m - base.m)/base.m * 10000 "gate_bp" FROM base JOIN x ON base.t = x.t ORDER BY base.t

WITH base AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)), x AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM okx_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}-USDT-SWAP' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)) SELECT base.t time, (x.m - base.m)/base.m * 10000 "okx_bp" FROM base JOIN x ON base.t = x.t ORDER BY base.t

WITH base AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)), x AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM kucoin_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'XBTUSDTM' ELSE concat('${base}', 'USDTM') END AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)) SELECT base.t time, (x.m - base.m)/base.m * 10000 "kucoin_bp" FROM base JOIN x ON base.t = x.t ORDER BY base.t

WITH base AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)), x AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM backpack_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '_USDC_PERP') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)) SELECT base.t time, (x.m - base.m)/base.m * 10000 "backpack_bp" FROM base JOIN x ON base.t = x.t ORDER BY base.t

WITH base AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)), x AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM hashkey_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT-PERPETUAL') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)) SELECT base.t time, (x.m - base.m)/base.m * 10000 "hashkey_bp" FROM base JOIN x ON base.t = x.t ORDER BY base.t

WITH base AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)), x AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM kraken_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'PF_XBTUSD' ELSE concat('PF_', '${base}', 'USD') END AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)) SELECT base.t time, (x.m - base.m)/base.m * 10000 "kraken_bp" FROM base JOIN x ON base.t = x.t ORDER BY base.t

WITH base AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)), x AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT.PERP') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)) SELECT base.t time, (x.m - base.m)/base.m * 10000 "flipster_bp" FROM base JOIN x ON base.t = x.t ORDER BY base.t

WITH base AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)), x AS (SELECT timestamp t, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '/USD') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY ${interval} FILL(LINEAR)) SELECT base.t time, (x.m - base.m)/base.m * 10000 "pyth_fair_bp" FROM base JOIN x ON base.t = x.t ORDER BY base.t

SELECT 'binance' exchange, '${base}_USDT' symbol, last(bid_price) bid, last(ask_price) ask, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) mid, last(timestamp) latest_ts FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'bybit', '${base}_USDT', last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'bitget', '${base}_USDT', last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'gate', '${base}_USDT', last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'okx', '${base}-USDT-SWAP', last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM okx_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}-USDT-SWAP' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'kucoin', CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'XBTUSDTM' ELSE concat('${base}', 'USDTM') END, last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM kucoin_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'XBTUSDTM' ELSE concat('${base}', 'USDTM') END AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'bingx', '${base}-USDT', last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}-USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'mexc', '${base}_USDT', last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'backpack', concat('${base}', '_USDC_PERP'), last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM backpack_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '_USDC_PERP') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'hashkey', concat('${base}', 'USDT-PERPETUAL'), last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM hashkey_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT-PERPETUAL') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'kraken', CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'PF_XBTUSD' ELSE concat('PF_', '${base}', 'USD') END, last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM kraken_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'PF_XBTUSD' ELSE concat('PF_', '${base}', 'USD') END AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'flipster', concat('${base}', 'USDT.PERP'), last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT.PERP') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'pyth_fair', concat('${base}', '/USD'), last(bid_price), last(ask_price), last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), last(timestamp) FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '/USD') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) ORDER BY mid
